title: AI Engineering Simplified — Issue #1: RAG from Scratch
summary: The first issue: building a production RAG pipeline from scratch — chunking strategies, embedding choices, retrieval evaluation, and the mistakes to avoid.

title: Issue #2: Agentic AI Design Patterns
summary: Multi-agent coordination patterns, tool-calling reliability, and when to use orchestrator-executor vs. parallel fan-out architectures.

title: Issue #3: LLM Deployment — From Prototype to Production
summary: What changes when you move an LLM app from a notebook to production — latency budgets, retries, streaming, and observability that actually works.

title: Issue #4: Vector Databases Compared
summary: Qdrant vs. ChromaDB vs. Pinecone — a practical comparison based on real production use cases, not benchmarks designed to favor the vendor.
